seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: input: skin as orbital-debris thruster-mode selection and generalize to variable-arity (k=1..5) weighted disjunctive constraints with a positive-literal-biased structure so the all-retrograde baseline is a genuinely mediocre reference; objective stays weighted Max-SAT (maximize cleared debris weight).
title: Orbital Debris Cleanup: Thruster Burn Scheduling
strategies: all-retrograde constant assignment (reproduces the checker baseline B, Ratio=0.1)
single-pass greedy: for each satellite pick the mode that clears more incremental weight
iterated local search / hill-climbing to a local optimum via weight-improving flips
multi-restart weighted local search (WalkSAT-style) keeping the best assignment
weight-aware initialization prioritizing heavy debris fields before flipping
